creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
The developers have now made this the release version.  Instead of 
creating a new port, I will submit an update to the existing port.  This 
new port submission can now be discarded.

Paul Schmehl (pauls@utdallas.edu)
Senior Information Security Analyst
The University of Texas at Dallas
http://www.utdallas.edu/ir/security/
